mapper.select: SELECT id FROM tb_store WHERE distributor_account_id = #{currentUserId}
SELECT count(*) AS newOrder FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 1
SELECT count(*) AS preparing FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 2
SELECT count(*) AS dispatch FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 3
SELECT count(*) AS confirming FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 4
SELECT count(*) AS completed FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 5

SELECT sum(qty) FROM tb_product_import JOIN tb_product_import_detail tpid ON tb_product_import.id = tpid.product_import_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND date_trunc('month', created_date) BETWEEN '${startDate}-01' AND '${endDate}-01'

SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order INNER JOIN tb_order_detail tod ON tb_order.id = tod.order_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND date_trunc('month', created_date) BETWEEN '${startDate}-01' AND '${endDate}-1'

SELECT sum(qty) FROM tb_order_detail INNER JOIN tb_order t ON t.id = tb_order_detail.order_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND date_trunc('month', created_date) BETWEEN '${startDate}-01' AND '${endDate}-1'

SELECT count(*) AS totalOrder FROM tb_order INNER JOIN tb_order_detail tod ON tb_order.id = tod.order_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND date_trunc('year', created_date) BETWEEN '${startYear}-01-01' AND '${endYear}-01-01'

SELECT sum(qty) AS totalProductImport FROM tb_product_import JOIN tb_product_import_detail tpid ON tb_product_import.id = tpid.product_import_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND date_trunc('year', created_date) BETWEEN '${startYear}-01-01' AND '${endYear}-01-01'

SELECT sum(qty) AS totalProductSold FROM tb_order_detail INNER JOIN tb_order t ON t.id = tb_order_detail.order_id WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND date_trunc('year', created_date) BETWEEN '${startYear}-01-01' AND '${endYear}-01-01'

SELECT count(*) AS totalMonthlyOrder FROM tb_order JOIN tb_order_detail tod ON tb_order.id = tod.order_id WHERE extract(year FROM created_date) = #{startYear} AND status_id = 5 AND store_id = #{storeId} GROUP BY date_trunc('year', created_date)
